# pfsense_firewall_nat_outbound_rules (Data Source)

Firewall NAT Outbound rules data source. Returns the outbound NAT mode and all outbound NAT rules.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_firewall_nat_outbound_rules" "all" {}

output "nat_outbound_mode" {
  value = data.pfsense_firewall_nat_outbound_rules.all.mode
}

output "nat_outbound_rule_count" {
  value = length(data.pfsense_firewall_nat_outbound_rules.all.rules)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `mode` (String) Outbound NAT mode. One of: `automatic`, `hybrid`, `advanced`, `disabled`.
- `rules` (List of Object) List of outbound NAT rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules))

### Nested Schema for `rules`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `destination_address` (String)
- `destination_not` (Boolean)
- `destination_port` (String)
- `disabled` (Boolean)
- `interface` (String)
- `nat_port` (String)
- `no_nat` (Boolean)
- `no_sync` (Boolean)
- `pool_options` (String)
- `protocol` (String)
- `source_address` (String)
- `source_hash_key` (String)
- `source_not` (Boolean)
- `source_port` (String)
- `static_nat_port` (Boolean)
- `target` (String)
- `target_ip` (String)
- `target_ip_subnet` (String)
